ValidationRule.description: Only BEAT Admins can update the Status to or from Holding, Approved, Assigned, Transferred, or Denied.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status__c), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Holding'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Approved'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Assigned'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Transferred'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Denied'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Donor Refused'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Holding'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Approved'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Assigned'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Transferred'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Denied'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Donor Refused'), NOT($Permission.BEAT_Admin) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only BEAT Admins can update the Status to or from Holding, Donor Refused, Approved, Assigned, Transferred, or Denied.
